commands.review_summary:
The branch updates memory-core shadow database cleanup to continue through all SQLite sidecar suffixes after a deletion failure and adds a regression test for that ordering.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +26. Total +34 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main calls `fs.rmSync` directly inside the suffix loop, so any thrown deletion error stops later cleanup attempts. I did not run a live Windows locked-file scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is ordinary maintainer review and required current-head checks.
